report.title: NVIDIA (NVDA) Q4 FY26 Earnings Preview
report.summary: Consensus expects revenue of $38.2B with data-center growth continuing to dominate.
report.markdown:
# NVIDIA (NVDA) Q4 FY26 Earnings Preview

Analysts see NVDA delivering another strong quarter driven by sustained hyperscaler demand [1].

## Consensus Estimates

Street consensus calls for revenue of $38.2B [1], up 72% YoY, with EPS of $0.86 [2]. Gross margin is modelled at 75.5% [1].

## Segments to Watch

The data center segment, now >85% of revenue, remains the primary driver [1]. Networking (InfiniBand + Spectrum-X) is expected to contribute ~$3.5B [2].

## Guidance

Management guided Q4 revenue to $37.5B ± 2% on the Q3 call [1]. The company reiterated it expects the Blackwell ramp to contribute meaningfully starting in fiscal Q4 [2].

## Scenarios

Bull: blowout on Blackwell allocations and sovereign AI deals; $41B+ revenue possible per consensus sidebar [2]. Bear: hyperscaler capex pause; revenue could slip toward $36B [1].

## Key Risks

Customer concentration, export controls, and competitive pressure from ASICs remain the dominant risks [2].
